about.hero_sub: Khotwa is a dedicated Syrian platform that closes the gap between job seekers and companies, turning the often complicated hiring journey into clear, simple, and fair steps for everyone.

story.title: A simple beginning... and a step toward a real solution
story.p1: Khotwa began with a simple observation: job seekers were spending significant time and effort navigating scattered, unreliable websites, while companies struggled to reach the talent they actually needed. Khotwa was built to solve that — one clear, organized platform that brings both sides together.
story.p2: We're continuously expanding the platform to cover every Syrian governorate, and improving it step by step based on the real needs of our users — both job seekers and companies.
story.card1: Opportunities for fresh graduates and experienced professionals alike
story.card2: Full coverage across every Syrian governorate
story.card3: Verified companies from a wide range of sectors
story.card4: A faster, clearer application and hiring journey

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To bring job opportunities closer to every job seeker in Syria through a trustworthy, easy-to-use platform that saves time and effort for job seekers and companies alike.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: For Khotwa to become the leading destination for Syria's job market, and an active contributor to rebuilding the national economy by connecting talent with the opportunities it deserves.

values.title: The values that guide our work

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: We present every job opportunity with accurate, clear information, without exaggeration or ambiguity, because trust is the foundation of our relationship with our users.

equal_opportunity.title: Equal Opportunity
equal_opportunity.desc: We open the job market to everyone, regardless of governorate or background, and connect real talent with the companies best suited to them.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: From sign-up to application, every step is designed to be fast, clear, and free of unnecessary technical friction.

growth.title: Continuous Improvement
growth.desc: We listen to our users and keep evolving the platform based on the real needs of the Syrian job market.

how.title: How the platform works
how.subtitle: Four simple steps between you and your next opportunity
how.step1_desc: Sign up as a job seeker or a company in just a few minutes.
how.step2_desc: Browse available jobs by specialization, governorate, or employment type.
how.step3_desc: Send your application directly from your profile, with no hassle.
how.step4_desc: Connect with companies and track your application status in real time.

cta.title: Ready to take your next step?
cta.sub: Whether you're looking for your next opportunity, or the talent your company needs, start with us today
cta.seeker_btn: Sign up as a job seeker
